title: Better Jukebox
description: A variety of jukebox tweaks to make them behave like background music instead of as block sounds.
body:
# Better Jukebox

A variety of jukebox tweaks to make them behave like background music instead of as block sounds.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/G2shODZERrM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features

- Music disc sounds are now non-directional, meaning they play in both ears equally regardless of where you're facing
- Automatically pauses background music while an active jukebox is within range, so the two don't conflict
	- The background music gradually fades in & out, and pauses fully when the volume fully fades out
- Music discs now continue playing in the pause menu just like background music does
- Jukeboxes now play at full volume from 0 to 50 blocks, fully fading out at 100 blocks

# Goals

- Add config options for jukebox distance & ticks to fade in/out

# Known Issues

- **Forge 1.20.1:** I can't seem to get a native Forge 1.20.1 working for some reason, but fortunately it *does* work with Sinytra Connector + the Fabric 1.20.1 build.

# Alternatives

Here are some similar mods in case you want to use those instead, or if this mod doesn't get updated.

- [Audio Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/audio-improvements)
- [Non-Directional Jukebox](https://modrinth.com/mod/non-directional-jukebox)
